Our ServicesGarden Design & Build

Professional garden landscaping services in Amersham, Chesham, Beaconsfield and throughout Buckinghamshire. From porcelain patios to complete garden transformations.

Get Free Quote07837 666 766

Porcelain Patios

Premium porcelain patio installations featuring frost-resistant, slip-proof paving with stunning designs that last decades.

  • Frost & slip-resistant
  • Stain-proof surface
  • 10+ year lifespan
  • Low maintenance
Learn More

Composite Decking

Beautiful composite decking that combines the natural warmth of timber with zero maintenance requirements.

  • Won't rot or warp
  • No staining required
  • 25+ year lifespan
  • Eco-friendly
Learn More

Glass Balustrades

Elegant glass balustrade installations that provide safety without compromising your stunning views.

  • Frameless options
  • BS compliant
  • Easy-clean coating
  • Indoor & outdoor
Learn More

Garden Landscaping

Complete garden transformations from design to completion. Hard and soft landscaping tailored to your vision.

  • Complete redesign
  • Hard & soft landscaping
  • Water features
  • 5-year guarantee
Learn More

Why Choose Oliver Charles?

We bring expertise, craftsmanship and dedication to every project.

10+ Years Experience

Over a decade creating beautiful outdoor spaces across Buckinghamshire.

5-Year Guarantee

All our work comes with a comprehensive 5-year workmanship guarantee.

Local Expertise

Based in Amersham, serving Chesham, Beaconsfield and surrounding areas.

Ready to Start Your Project?

Get a free, no-obligation quote. We serve Amersham, Chesham, Beaconsfield and all surrounding areas.

OLIVER CHARLESGARDEN DESIGN & BUILD

Family-run garden design and build specialists in Amersham, Buckinghamshire. Transforming outdoor spaces with porcelain patios, composite decking, and glass balustrades since 2015.
